user_task_description: This slide contains a milestone table, but the table is missing an `Owner` column.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Insert a new `Owner` column between `Milestone` and `Due Date` in the table on the slide.
atomic_scope: Only the table-structure change is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with the requested table modification.

inspired_by.title: Trying to figure out a PPT Report

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- Table edits in slides are brittle compared with plain text edits
- The change must preserve the existing rows and column order around the insertion point
- The slide is otherwise simple, so the task is specifically structural
